name: Churchill Downs Inc
business: Churchill Downs Incorporated provides entertainment experiences through live and historical racing, wagering services, and gaming operations. The Company manages its business through three reportable segments: Live and Historical Racing, Wagering Services and Solutions, and Gaming.

exposures.sentence: CDI has expanded through the acquisition, development, and operation of live and historical racing entertainment venues, the growth of the online wagering businesses, and the acquisition, development, and operation of regional casino gaming properties.
Our business is subject to cybersecurity risk, including the risk of data privacy and cybersecurity breaches or attacks on our or our third-party service providers' IT systems.

The Company's competitors may adopt new technologies and technological advancements, such as using artificial intelligence and machine learning, to pursue new products, services and approaches more quickly, successfully, and effectively than the Company.

An inability to attract and retain key and highly qualified and skilled personnel, as well as disruptions in the general labor market, could impact our ability to successfully develop, operate, and grow our business.

catalysts.event: Renovation of Finish Line Suites and The Mansion for 152nd Kentucky Derby
catalysts.sentence: The Company is investing up to $30 million to renovate the existing Finish Line Suites and The Mansion to enhance the existing areas and provide improved amenities for the 152nd Kentucky Derby in May 2026.

catalysts.event: New building on the first turn of Churchill Downs Racetrack completion
catalysts.sentence: The Company anticipates construction of this new building will begin following the 2026 Kentucky Derby and will be completed by the 2028 Kentucky Derby.
The Company plans to open Rockingham in mid-2027 with an expected capital investment of $180-200 million.

catalysts.event: Marshall Yards Racing & Gaming grand opening
catalysts.sentence: Marshall Yards Racing & Gaming ("Marshall Yards") held its grand opening on February 25, 2026 in Calvert City, Kentucky.
